mapper.select: SELECT A.DI, A.ROLE, A.USR_ID, A.PRIV_YN, A.PRIV_DTTM, A.QUAN_YN, A.QUAL_YN, A.DISQ_YN_1, A.DISQ_UNIV_CD_1, A.DISQ_YN_2, A.DISQ_UNIV_CD_2, A.NAME, A.GENDER, A.TEL_HP, A.TEL_HOME, A.BIRTHDAY, A.ADDR_HOME_ZIPCODE, A.ADDR_HOME, A.ADDR_HOME_DETAIL, A.UNIV_CD, (SELECT DISTINCT UNIV_NM FROM E6_EDNST_ADDR_M WHERE UNIV_CD = A.UNIV_CD) AS UNIV_CD_NM, A.JOB_NM, A.POSITION, A.DEPT, A.EMAIL, A.ADDR_JOB_ZIPCODE, A.ADDR_JOB, A.ADDR_JOB_DETAIL, A.TEL_JOB, A.RESUME_1, A.RESUME_2, A.EDU_DIV, A.JOB_CD, A.UNIV_DIV, CASE WHEN A.UNIV_DIV IS NOT NULL THEN (SELECT DISTINCT UNIV_TYPE_NM FROM E6_EDNST_ADDR_M WHERE UNIV_TYPE_CD = A.UNIV_DIV) ELSE NULL END AS UNIV_DIV_NM, A.CTPV_CD, CASE WHEN A.CTPV_CD IS NOT NULL THEN (SELECT DISTINCT CTPV_NM FROM E6_EDNST_ADDR_M WHERE CTPV_CD = A.CTPV_CD) ELSE NULL END AS CTPV_CD_NM, A.DEL_YN, A.INPT_ID, A.INPT_DT, A.LAST_CHNRG_ID, A.LAST_CHG_DT, A.IP, A.FILE_ID, (SELECT ORG_FILE_NAME FROM EVA_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = A.FILE_ID AND FILE_SEQ = '0001') FILE_NM FROM EVA_POOL_M A WHERE A.DI = #{di}

SELECT epd.DI, epd.USR_ID, epd.SEQ, epd.EDU_YM, epd.UNIV_CD, ec.CODE_NM AS UNIV_NM, -- eva_code 테이블에서 가져온 CODE_NM epd.LOC_CD, epd.LOC_CD_NM, epd.DEG_CD, epd.DEG_CD_NM, epd.MAJOR, epd.DEL_YN FROM EVA_POOL_DEGREE epd LEFT JOIN eva_code ec ON epd.UNIV_CD = ec.org_cd AND ec.group_cd = 'LAST_DEG_ACQS_SCHL_CD' WHERE epd.USR_ID = #{usrId} AND (epd.DEL_YN IS NULL OR epd.DEL_YN != 'Y') ORDER BY epd.DEG_CD

SELECT eft.DI, eft.USR_ID, eft.SEQ, eft.JOB_ST_YM, eft.JOB_ED_YM, eft.UNIV_CD, ec.CODE_NM AS UNIV_NM, -- 대학명은 eva_code 테이블에서 가져온다 eft.DEPT, eft.DEL_YN FROM EVA_POOL_FULLTIME_TEACHER eft LEFT JOIN eva_code ec ON eft.UNIV_CD = ec.org_cd AND ec.group_cd = 'LAST_DEG_ACQS_SCHL_CD' -- 조건에 맞는 테이블 조인 WHERE eft.USR_ID = #{usrId} AND (eft.DEL_YN IS NULL OR eft.DEL_YN != 'Y') ORDER BY eft.JOB_ST_YM, eft.JOB_ED_YM, eft.SEQ
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(SEQ), 0) + 1 SEQ FROM EVA_POOL_DEGREE WHERE USR_ID = #{usrId}
INSERT INTO EVA_POOL_DEGREE ( DI,USR_ID, SEQ, DEG_CD, DEG_CD_NM, UNIV_CD, UNIV_NM, EDU_YM, MAJOR, DEL_YN, INPT_ID, INPT_DT ) VALUES ( #{di},#{usrId}, #{SEQ}, #{degCd}, #{degCdNm}, #{degUnivCd}, #{degUnivNm}, #{degEduYm}, #{degMajor}, 'N', #{usrId}, SYSDATE )

SELECT NVL(MAX(SEQ), 0) + 1 SEQ FROM EVA_POOL_FULLTIME_TEACHER WHERE USR_ID = #{usrId}
INSERT INTO EVA_POOL_FULLTIME_TEACHER ( DI,USR_ID, SEQ, JOB_ST_YM, JOB_ED_YM, UNIV_CD, UNIV_NM, DEPT, DEL_YN, INPT_ID, INPT_DT ) VALUES ( #{di},#{usrId}, #{SEQ}, #{fttJobStYm}, #{fttjobEdYm}, #{fttUnivCd}, #{fttUnivNm}, #{fttDept}, 'N', #{usrId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EVA_POOL_M WHERE USR_ID = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EVA_POOL_M WHERE USR_ID = #{email} AND USR_ID != #{orgEmail}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY UNIV_NM) R_NUM , UNIV_TYPE_CD , UNIV_TYPE_NM , CTPV_CD , CTPV_NM , UNIV_CD , UNIV_NM FROM E6_EDNST_ADDR_M
AND (UNIV_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%') AND APLCN_YR = (SELECT MAX(APLCN_YR) FROM E6_EDNST_ADDR_M)
ORDER BY UNIV_NM

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CODE) R_NUM , ORG_CD /* 코드값 */ , CODE_NM /* 코드명 */ , ADD_CMT /* 추가컬럼 */ FROM EVA_CODE
AND GROUP_CD = 'LAST_DEG_ACQS_SCHL_CD' AND USE_YN = 'Y'
AND ADD_CMT = '국내' AND ( (UPPER(CODE_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchText}) || '%') )
AND ADD_CMT = '국외' AND ( (UPPER(CODE_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchText}) || '%') )
ORDER BY CODE_NM
